How We Make It

The Craft Behind Trove

01

Fabric Selection

We carefully choose premium-quality fabrics for durability, comfort, and a beautiful finish.

02

Design

Each artwork is thoughtfully designed, inspired by culture, nature, and timeless craftsmanship.

03

Hand Painting

Every design is meticulously hand-painted by skilled artisans, making each piece uniquely its own.

04

Finishing

Each product is carefully finished, quality-checked, and prepared to bring handcrafted elegance into your home — each Trove piece arrives ready to be cherished.

Follow Along

Every brushstroke carries a story. Every design, intentional.

Follow us for new arrivals, behind-the-scenes, and the world of Trove.
